# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

---
apiVersion: 2019-04-01
description: ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting
parameters:
  - name: accountName
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: The name of the storage account
  - name: location
    type: string
    defaultValue: [resourceGroup().location]
    metadata:
      description: The Azure region where the resources will be deployed
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    name: "[parameters('accountName')]"
    apiVersion: 2019-04-01
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
      kind: StorageV2
      enableHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: false
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices
    name: "[concat(parameters('accountName'), '/default')]"
    apiVersion: 2019-04-01
    dependsOn:
      - storageAccounts
    properties:
      isVersioningEnabled: true
      automaticSnapshotPolicyEnabled: false
      deleteRetentionPolicy:
        enabled: true
        days: 7
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    name: "[concat(parameters('accountName'), '/default/web')]"
    apiVersion: 2019-04-01
    dependsOn:
      - storageAccounts
    properties:
      publicAccess: Blob
